description: The Association of Combatant Clerics (Majma'-e Rowhaniyoun-e Mobarez, MRM) broke away from the conservative [Combatant Clergy Association](/orgs/combatant-clergy-association) in 1988. It is the reformist counterpart in clerical politics, associated with the Islamic left and later the reform movement. Key figures include [Mehdi Karroubi](/people/mehdi-karroubi) and [Mohammad Khatami](/people/mohammad-khatami) (the president). It supports political liberalisation within an Islamic framework.
editorial_notes: Broke away from the JRM in 1988. Associated with the reformist wing of clerical politics. Karroubi served as Secretary-General.
